designRationale: Silver Ridge supplies the highest-leverage pattern in the set: a persistent 4-badge trust strip (certification + certification + financing + 24/7) above the fold on every service and location page. Combined with the emotional master hook 'We Protect Your Greatest Investment' and a single frictionless CTA, this structure converts organic landings consistently. Panther Roof adds the named inspection concept (reframes first contact as low-commitment) and a dual-platform review display. Horvath adds the Roof Care Club maintenance membership (recurring revenue hook) and scarcity micro-copy. Colorado Preferred was inaccessible.
